name: Scallops with Lemon-Pepper Fettucini & Sun-Dried Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup sun-dried tomatoes, oil-packed, drained and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat half the olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add the scallop slices and stir constantly until just cooked through, about 1-2 minutes. Remove the scallops and set aside with their cooking liquid.
2. Add the remaining olive oil to the same pan and saute the garlic over low-medium heat, stirring often, until soft and fragrant, about 3-5 minutes.
3. Cook the fettucini for about 2 minutes.
4. In a separate saucepan, add the white wine and cook over high heat until the liquid reduces by about half. Stir in the sun-dried tomatoes, capers, lemon juice, lemon zest, parsley, salt, and pepper. Return the scallops and their cooking liquid to the pan and heat through, adjusting seasonings as needed.
5. Toss the cooked pasta with about 3/4 of the sauce. Top with scallops and remaining sauce, then serve hot.
